entries.description: Apple Music supports low-risk media playback through search and submit.

capabilities.summary: Search for a concrete playable song, album, or playlist and submit it. Artist or genre playback must choose a representative playable query, include mediaSelection metadata, and verify visible media text.

entries.description: Terminal is a shell app and is not selected for generic local-app automation.

entries.description: Settings are changed with system tools (defaults, networksetup, osascript) through shell_exec, not by driving the System Settings UI, so the GUI itself is not a generic-automation target.
entries.denyReason: Settings are changed via system tools through shell_exec, not by automating the System Settings UI.
